name: @miscellaneous/commitlint
description: Cross-runtime Conventional Commits linter for Deno, Node.js, Bun, and Cloudflare Workers.

tasks.check: deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno check mod.ts examples/worker.ts && deno task test
tasks.test: deno task test:unit && deno task test:doc
tasks.test:doc: deno test --doc mod.ts src/parse.ts src/lint.ts src/format.ts
tasks.coverage:collect: deno test --doc --coverage=coverage --clean src/format_test.ts src/lint_test.ts src/parse_test.ts mod.ts src/parse.ts src/lint.ts src/format.ts
tasks.coverage:text: deno task coverage:collect && deno coverage coverage
tasks.coverage:html: deno task coverage:collect && deno coverage coverage --html
tasks.coverage:lcov: deno task coverage:collect && deno coverage coverage --lcov --output=coverage.lcov
